summary: Completed comprehensive testing of password change functionality. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI for both Billing page Security tab and Admin Dashboard reset password dialog working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor Recharts initialization issue, non-blocking (existing issue from previous iteration)

passed_tests: User change password - wrong current password returns 400
User change password - short new password (<6 chars) returns 400
User change password - no auth returns 401/403
User change password - success with valid credentials
User can login with new password after change
Admin reset user password - no auth returns 401/403
Admin reset user password - non-admin user returns 403
Admin reset user password - short password returns 400
Admin reset user password - invalid user ID returns 404
Admin reset user password - success for valid user
Admin change own password - wrong current password returns 400
Admin change own password - endpoint validates password length
Billing page Security tab loads correctly
Security tab shows password change form with all fields
Current password, new password, confirm password inputs present
Change password button present and functional
Admin Dashboard Users tab shows reset password button (Key icon)
Reset password dialog opens when clicking Key icon
Reset password dialog shows user email and password input
Reset password dialog has Anulează and Resetează buttons
Admin Platform Settings tab shows password change section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password change functionality fully tested. User can change password via /api/auth/change-password (requires current password validation). Admin can reset any user's password via /api/admin/users/{user_id}/reset-password. Admin can also change their own password via /api/admin/change-password. UI implemented in BillingPage (Securitate tab) and AdminDashboard (Users tab - Key icon button opens reset dialog, Platform Settings tab has admin password change form).
